description:
📑25 Lessons I wish I Knew (My e-book)
Order Now - https://topmate.io/insurance_impact/1450062
📲 Ask your query - https://topmate.io/insurance_impact/

Super Top-Up Health Insurance: The Ultimate Buying Guide! ✅

Are you thinking about getting a Super Top-Up Health Insurance Plan but don’t know how to choose the right one? 🤔 In this video, I’ll explain everything you need to know before buying a super top-up plan, including:

✅ What are Super Top-Up Plans & How Do They Work?
✅ What is a Deductible & How to Choose the Best Deductible for You?
✅ Should You Buy a Super Top-Up Plan from the Same or a Different Company?
✅ 7 Common Mistakes People Make While Buying a Super Top-Up Plan & How to Avoid Them!

A Super Top-Up Plan can save you from huge medical bills, but only if you choose the right one! Watch till the end to learn the best strategies to select a budget-friendly and effective super top-up plan for yourself and your family.

🔔 Don’t forget to LIKE, SHARE & SUBSCRIBE for more valuable insights on health insurance!

💬 Have questions? Drop them in the comments, and I’ll reply!

#SuperTopUpInsurance #HealthInsurance #BestInsurancePlan #SuperTopUpVsTopUp #InsuranceTips #DeductibleExplained #InsuranceImpact

🔔 Join the Impact Buddy family for exclusive content, early access, and more!      
Hit the ‘Join’ button now! 🙌 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCQ4x31UUdKCqQcJvL2SFxyg/join

Join & Stay ahead in the world of insurance! 📢✨ - https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Va9CZqq4inozpdKQkm3b

comments.text: Base policy 5L, Super Topup 10L with deductible 3L, Claim 4L - will the claim be settled as (a) 3L from Base and 1L from SuperTopup or (b) all 4L from base ?

comments.author: @insuranceimpact

comments.text: Are super top up reliable?
comments.author: @R51900

comments.text:
Sir, it depends on our expectations.
They will provide coverage like a base plan after the deductible limit.
Provides peace of mind for costly treatments at a lower premium.
But there are some hassles, specifically where the base policy and super top-up are used in a single hospitalization. 
You have to go for reimbursement in such cases.
But it's reliable as far as coverage is concerned.
comments.author: @insuranceimpact

comments.text:
Sir, 

Please clear out my doubt.


Say I have a base insurance of 10 lakhs, and opting for a 30 lakh super top up with 10 lakh deductible.


Can you please tell if the example of A) & B) claims as explained is valid or not? 


Example A) 1st claim - 15 lakh - 10 lakh paid from base. Remaining 5 lakh from super top up plan.


A) 2nd claim - again 15 lakh - base sum insured amount exhausted and super top up triggered. Hence all 15 lakh paid from paid from super top up. 


Example B) 1st claim -  4 lakh - paid from base insurance . Remaining amount 6 lakh. 


B) 2nd claim - 5 lakh - paid from base insurance. Remaining amount 1 lakh.


B) 3rd claim - 15 lakh - super top up activated. 1 lakh paid from base insurance & 14 lakh from super top up. 

or any other? Will I have to bear from my pocket?
comments.author: @partha974

comments.text: Its all covered, but the main issue will be that remaining amount will be claimed as reimbursement from super top up in most cases.
comments.author: @insuranceimpact

comments.text: ​ @insuranceimpact even if the base and super top up from same company
comments.author: @ferozikbal2454

comments.text: Is it possible to include an annual deductible with the base policy when opting for a super top-up? comments.text: Yes you can do that & You can choose any deductible amount, Super Top up plan coverage will start after that defined limit. It's totally a matter of what you have to bear from your pocket ultimately.

comments.author: @insuranceimpact

comments.text: Thanks for the detailed explanation, please just clear one confusion, instead of buying a super topup isn't it better to buy a policy with high sum insured? Or is super topup a cheap alternative? If it is then is there any catch because as you know insurance companies are not here for charity and if their are two ways provided for the same bill reimbursement so their must be some difference. Because from where I'm looking, a person with 20L sum insured is the same as a person with 5L sum insured with 15L super top up and 5L deductible amount. Basically, when someone should go for super top up and when for high sum insured?
comments.author: @Ashu_toshRai

comments.text:
Having a policy with  high sum insured is not the best choice always. especially when there is no existing health issues and chances of any claim are low. You pay heavy premiums unnecessarily. The ideal thing is to have enough sum insured in the base policy not minimum, and keep super top up for any surprising health emergency which can cost a lot during treatment.
This way you have 2 layers of financial security in case of any health crisis. The point is that don't try to use super top up in place of base plan. it's an additional thing
comments.author: @insuranceimpact

comments.text:
Sir meri current policy HDFC Ergo Optima Secure hai.Its base cover is 10L ,it covers upto 20L from day 1,further after 2 years it is now covering upto 30L.
Mujhe apne super top-up mein kitna deductibles rkhna chahiye? 10L,20L or 30L?
comments.author: @Rohit...Sharma

comments.text: Between 7 -10 lakhs , I mean basic sum insured se jyada nahi
comments.author: @insuranceimpact

comments.text: @insuranceimpact  but it covers 20L from day 1? Shouldn't I deduct 20L?
comments.author: @Rohit...Sharma

comments.text:
Dear, sometimes plans or some features are withdrawn and in that case you will face a problem in a super top up plan.
It's good that your plan covers two or three times your basic sum insured, but your only permanent and guaranteed sum insured is your basic some insured. Even if you port for migrate sometime in future, the new insurer is bound to give you the minimum basic sum insured and that will be in perfect alignment with your super top up plan.
comments.author: @insuranceimpact

If you have any figures related to this, along with existing premium rates for Indian public sector insurance company, it would be very helpful.

Thanks for mentioning it ! 🙂

comments.text: Sir plz tell me one thing can we port our super top up policy
comments.author: @mahavirnegi8441

comments.text: I don't think so
comments.author: @VishalArora1008

comments.text: @VishalArora1008  no only base policy port hoti hai
comments.author: @avtarkaint

comments.text:
As per IRDA Guidelines You can Port any Individual/ Family floater policy but must know the terms:
1. You can port to any general or specialized health insurance company.
2.  Portability will be subject to underwriter approval of new insurer.
3. New insurer must provide minimum existing sum insured.
4. If approved, all continuity benefits will be intact like waiting period etc.

So the conclusion is that a Super Top up plan can be ported on Insurer approval. It's totally up to them.
comments.author: @insuranceimpact

HDFC ergo health insurance company fraud company hai 
HDFC ergo health insurance company ki policy kabhi mat lena 
HDFC ergo health insurance company AYUSH aur IRDAI ka guidelines follow nahi karta hai 
HDFC ergo health insurance company Jindal Naturecure Institute Bangalore ka naturopathy treatment ka claim regect karta hai 
HDFC ergo health insurance company ne Mera health insurance policy inactive karke mujhe barbad kar diya hai 
Take care and don't buy HDFC ergo health insurance company ki policy kabhi mat lena
